name: VAV Terminal Unit - Model VAV-16R
description: Variable air volume terminal unit with hot water reheat
pdf_content:
VAV TERMINAL UNIT SUBMITTAL
Project: Medical Office Building

TERMINAL UNIT DATA
Manufacturer: AirControl Technologies
Model: VAV-16R-HW
Type: Single Duct VAV with Hot Water Reheat
Size: 16" inlet

AIRFLOW CHARACTERISTICS
Maximum CFM: 2,000
Minimum CFM: 400 (20% of max)
Inlet Pressure Range: 0.5" to 3.0" w.g.
Noise Criteria: NC-30 at max flow
Pressure Drop: 0.15" w.g. at max flow
Leakage: <2% at 3" w.g.

DAMPER SPECIFICATIONS
Damper Type: Opposed blade
Actuator: Electronic, 24VAC, proportional
Actuator Torque: 35 in-lb
Control Signal: 2-10VDC
Fail Position: Normally open

REHEAT COIL
Coil Type: 2-row hot water
Capacity: 45 MBH at 180°F EWT
Water Flow: 4.5 GPM
Pressure Drop: 2.5 ft water
Connection Size: 3/4" copper
Control Valve: 2-way modulating, Cv=4.0

CONSTRUCTION
Casing: 22-gauge galvanized steel
Insulation: 1" fiberglass, R-4.2
Liner: Perforated galvanized
Access Door: Hinged, gasketed
Hanger Brackets: Included

CONTROLS INTEGRATION
Controller: DDC VAV controller
Protocol: BACnet MS/TP
Points List:
- Space Temperature (input)
- Damper Position (output)
- Reheat Valve Position (output)
- Airflow Measurement (input)
- Discharge Air Temperature (input)

COMMISSIONING PROCEDURE
1. Verify installation per manufacturer guidelines
2. Check damper rotation range (0-90°)
3. Calibrate airflow sensor using traverse
4. Set maximum and minimum CFM setpoints
5. Verify damper response to control signal
6. Test reheat coil operation and capacity
7. Perform air balance at design conditions
8. Verify BAS communication and point mapping
9. Test morning warm-up sequence
10. Check acoustical performance
11. Document control sequence of operation

Submitted: February 20, 2024
Prepared By: Temperature Controls Inc.
Page 1 of 2
